questions.question: Implement a sliding window protocol in the data link layer. Explain how the window size and maximum transmission units (MTUs) affect the performance of the protocol. (15 marks)
Write a C program to simulate a sliding window protocol between two devices. The program should handle packet transmission and receive acknowledgment (ACK) packets. (20 marks)

A sliding window protocol is used in a network with an MTU of 1500 bytes. If the sender wants to send data at a rate of 1000 bytes per second, how much time will it take for the sender to send 5000 bytes of data? (10 marks)
